1761580.name: Mayhem Brawler Original Soundtrack
1761580.description: The Mayhem Brawler Original Soundtrack composed by talented Emir Merzeci features 47 kick-ass tunes from the game. This euphonious package offers a wide variety of genres from instrumental rock to electronic music. Reminisce the urban-fantasy-themed story of Mayhem Brawler with the blood-pumping boss themes and powerful level tracks!
